title: LAUNCH & VERIFY
body: Open your browser. Navigate to your Perspective URL. Log in. You should see your view rendering with live data from your PLC. You have a working SCADA system.
code:
Browser URL:
  http://localhost:8088/data/perspective/client/MyPlant

You should see:
  ✓ Your view rendering
  ✓ Live tag values updating
  ✓ Components bound to PLC data
  ✓ Gateway: running
  ✓ Device:  connected
  ✓ Quality: GOOD

Next:
  → More views
  → Alarm pipelines
  → Tag history trends
  → Navigation
  → Authentication
  → Production deploy
key: Works on any device with a browser
mistakes: HTTP when HTTPS is required by auth
Skipping auth before going to production
